category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/sipeed/picoclaw describes PicoClaw as an ultra-lightweight personal AI assistant written in Go.
source_facts.description says "Ultra-efficient personal AI assistant in Go".
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives picoclaw; official README at https://github.com/sipeed/picoclaw uses the display name "PicoClaw".
docs_sources: Dedicated official docs domain found at docs.picoclaw.io.
Official README at https://github.com/sipeed/picoclaw links detailed guides beyond the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/sipeed/picoclaw, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/sipeed/picoclaw describes CLI configuration, LLM providers, MCP, and resource-constrained hardware use.
source_facts.description identifies a personal AI assistant in Go.
